changelog: 0.4.4 Bidirectional Volume Sync—new toggle for HA ↔ Sendspin linkage. Real-time sync or complete decoupling. Thanks @danwig. Audio queue integrity fixed—tracks now complete before transitioning. Legacy camera compatibility patched for LineageOS 17.1, Galaxy S2 8.0 LTE (#61). Thanks @yaro24. Header styling corrected. Wake word ducking restored—media attenuates on wake detection (#59). Thanks @nils-mosbach.
